notes: Requires Node.js >= 18 (native fetch)
Native fetch is used internally

signature: new TinyClient({ token: string, plan: TinyPlan, httpClient?: HttpClient })
example: const client = new TinyClient({ token: process.env.TINY_TOKEN!, plan: 'Evoluir' })
notes: plan controls rate limiting
Começar = 0 req/min; Crescer = 30; Evoluir = 60; Potencializar = 120

description: Client exposes products and orders namespaces
notes: Both are auto-wired on construction

description: Search products by query and page
example: const { products, page, numberOfPages } = await client.products.searchProducts({ query: 'camiseta', page: 1 })
notes: Returns Product[] with pagination

description: Fetch a single product by ID
notes: id is a string even though Tiny uses int internally

description: Create a new product (2 API calls)
example: const created = await client.products.createProduct({ name: 'X', status: 'active', price: 59.9 })
notes: Makes create + getProduct calls; returns fully populated record

description: Partial update of a product (2 API calls)
notes: Makes update + getProduct calls; returns fully populated record

description: Get full stock details for a product
example: const stock = await client.products.getStock('123456'); console.log(stock.quantity, stock.reservedQuantity)
notes: Returns quantity + reservedQuantity + deposits array

description: Get bill-of-materials (BOM) structure of a kit/manufactured product
example: const structure = await client.products.getStructure('123456'); for (const c of structure.components) { console.log(c.name, c.quantity) }
notes: components[] has componentId, sku, name, quantity

description: Get all products changed since a date
notes: since is ISO date YYYY-MM-DD

description: Get stock movements since a date
notes: Requires 'API para estoque em tempo real' Tiny extension. Records removed from queue after retrieval.

description: Update stock level with movement type
notes: movementType: 'entry'=add | 'exit'=remove | 'balance'=set absolute

example: const { orders } = await client.orders.searchOrders({ status: 'open', startDate: '2024-01-01', endDate: '2024-12-31' })
notes: status filter values: open/approved/cancelled/invoiced/shipped/delivered

description: Fetch a single order by ID
notes: Returns full Order with customer, items, installments, tracking, etc.

description: Create a new order (2 API calls)
example: await client.orders.createOrder({ status: 'open', customer: { name: 'João' }, items: [], total: 0 })
notes: customer is a required nested object (not flat customerName)

description: Partial update of an order (2 API calls)
notes: Makes update + getOrder calls; returns fully populated record

example: id name sku status type price salePrice costPrice averageCostPrice ncm origin gtin gtinPackaging ipiClass fixedIpiValue serviceListCode cest unit unitsPerBox netWeight grossWeight packagingType packagingHeight packagingWidth packagingLength packagingDiameter minStock maxStock supplierId supplierCode supplierProductCode class brand category location variationType parentProductId attributes variations kitItems madeToOrder preparationDays description notes warranty attachments externalImages seoTitle seoKeywords seoDescription videoLink slug mappings createdAt
notes: status replaces old 'active: boolean' field
Maps Tiny's situacao: A=active I=inactive
Maps Tiny's tipo: P=product S=service
Maps Tiny's classe
Maps Tiny's tipo_variacao: N/P/V
Maps Tiny's tipoEmbalagem: 1/2/3

description: Full stock shape returned by getStock
signature: interface ProductStock { productId: string; name: string; sku?: string; unit?: string; quantity: number; reservedQuantity: number; deposits: ProductStockDeposit[] }
notes: quantity is total from Tiny's saldo field; NOT a sum of deposits

signature: interface ProductStockDeposit { name: string; ignore: boolean; quantity: number; company?: string }
notes: ignore=true when Tiny's desconsiderar='S'
entry=E (adds); exit=S (removes); balance=B (sets absolute)

signature: interface UpdateStockInput { productId: string; quantity: number; movementType?: StockMovementType; date?: string; unitPrice?: number; notes?: string; warehouse?: string }
notes: productId is a string; maps to Tiny's idProduto

signature: interface UpdateStockResult { sequenceId: string; status: string; movementId: number; balanceAfter: number; reservedBalance: number; isNewRecord: boolean }
notes: balanceAfter is the new total stock after the movement

signature: interface StockUpdate { productId: string; name: string; sku?: string; unit?: string; variationType?: StockVariationType; location?: string; updatedAt: string; quantity: number; reservedQuantity: number; deposits: StockUpdateDeposit[] }
notes: updatedAt is a raw string from Tiny (may be dd/mm/yyyy hh:mm:ss)
Maps Tiny's tipo_variacao: N/P/V

signature: interface ProductStructure { productId: string; name: string; sku?: string; components: ProductStructureComponent[] }
notes: Used for kit and manufactured products

signature: interface ProductStructureComponent { componentId: string; sku?: string; name: string; quantity: number }
notes: componentId maps from Tiny's id_componente

example: id number ecommerceNumber status createdAt estimatedAt invoicedAt shippedAt deliveredAt updatedAt customer deliveryAddress items paymentTerms paymentMethod paymentMethodDescription installments integratedPayments carrierName freightResponsibility freightMethod shippingMethod freightAmount discount additionalExpenses itemsTotal total purchaseOrderNumber sellerId sellerName invoiceId warehouse operationNatureId trackingCode trackingUrl notes internalNotes ecommerce intermediary markers
notes: customer is a nested OrderCustomer object, not flat fields
Maps 10 Tiny statuses to 6 normalized values

signature: interface OrderCustomer { code?: string; name: string; tradeName?: string; personType?: PersonType; taxId?: string; stateRegistration?: string; rg?: string; address?: string; addressNumber?: string; addressComplement?: string; neighborhood?: string; zipCode?: string; city?: string; state?: string; country?: string; phone?: string; email?: string }
notes: name is the only required field. taxId = CPF or CNPJ depending on personType
Maps Tiny's tipo_pessoa: F=individual J=company E=foreign

description: Delivery address when different from customer
signature: interface OrderDeliveryAddress { personType?: PersonType; taxId?: string; recipientName?: string; address?: string; addressNumber?: string; addressComplement?: string; neighborhood?: string; zipCode?: string; city?: string; state?: string; phone?: string; stateRegistration?: string }
notes: Set on Order.deliveryAddress
Maps Tiny's frete_por_conta: C=sender D=recipient 3=third-party S=no-freight

signature: interface OrderItem { productId?: string; sku?: string; productName: string; unit?: string; quantity: number; unitPrice: number; totalPrice: number; additionalInfo?: string }
notes: productId is optional (not always returned by search endpoint)

signature: interface OrderInstallment { days?: number; dueDate?: string; amount: number; notes?: string; paymentMethod: string; paymentMethodDescription?: string }
notes: dueDate is ISO YYYY-MM-DD

signature: interface OrderMarker { id: number; description: string; color?: string }
notes: color is hex e.g. '#FF0000'

signature: interface OrderEcommerce { id?: number; orderNumber?: string; salesChannelOrderNumber?: string; storeName?: string; salesChannel?: string }
notes: Present when order originated from an e-commerce channel

signature: interface OrderIntermediary { name: string; taxId: string; paymentTaxId?: string }
notes: taxId and paymentTaxId are CNPJ

signature: interface OrderIntegratedPayment { amount: number; paymentType: number; intermediaryTaxId: string; authorizationCode: string; cardBrandCode: number }
notes: paymentType per NFe table; cardBrandCode per NFe table

description: Base error class for all client errors
signature: class TinyApiError extends Error { code: string; details?: unknown }
notes: catch with instanceof TinyApiError

description: Thrown when plan has no access or quota exceeded
notes: Thrown immediately for 'Começar' plan; thrown when queue stalls

description: Thrown on network failures or unparseable JSON
notes: Wraps fetch errors and JSON.parse errors

description: Thrown when a Tiny API field cannot be mapped
notes: Carries details with the raw value that failed to parse

description: Token never appears in error messages
notes: sanitizeUrl() applied to all FetchHttpClient error paths
Batch calls: 5 for all paid plans

description: Token bucket queue — requests are queued when limit is reached
notes: No manual retry needed; queue releases at plan rate

description: Começar plan has zero API access
notes: Any call throws TinyRateLimitError immediately

description: Inject a custom HttpClient for testing or proxying
example: const client = new TinyClient({ token, plan, httpClient: new MyClient() })

description: Use a stub HttpClient to test without hitting Tiny API
example: Map path fragments to mock retorno payloads
notes: Useful for unit tests of code that uses this library

description: Use msw (Mock Service Worker) for integration tests
notes: Intercepts fetch at network level

example: import 'dotenv/config'; new TinyClient({ token: process.env.TINY_TOKEN!, plan: ... })

description: Validate env vars with zod before creating client
All Tiny API Portuguese fields are translated to English automatically
notes: e.g. nome->name, preco->price, situacao->status, data_pedido->createdAt

description: Tiny date format converted to ISO automatically
notes: parseTinyDate() used internally; all Date fields on Order are ISO

description: Numeric strings with comma decimal parsed to float
notes: TinyMappingError thrown if non-numeric

description: 10 Tiny order statuses mapped to 6 OrderStatus values
example: Em aberto->open; Aprovado/Preparando envio->approved; Faturado->invoiced; Pronto para envio/Enviado->shipped; Entregue->delivered; Não entregue/Cancelado/Cancelado pelo marketplace->cancelled
